lint.note: Repository has no lint script; build used as third project validator from feature verification expectations and prior synthesis convention.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that ZoneScene owns runtime fog/exploration state and that UIScene must invalidate ZoneScene equipment stat cache on all equipment mutations.
Documented Vitest Phaser mock requirements for importing production IsometricUtils helpers through config.ts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Adjust systems-worker testing guidance so workers may validate Phaser-wrapped systems via extracted pure-logic seams when direct module imports pull in unmockable runtime dependencies.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fog reviews noted that FogOfWarSystem testing required the FogOfWarCore seam because importing the Phaser-wrapped system directly pulled in config/Phaser-only symbols.
